headerDisplay:
Control your Volvo XC90 2016 from Apple Home via the Volvo Connected Vehicle API v2. Get your VCC API Key at [developer.volvocars.com](https://developer.volvocars.com).

**First-time setup:** Fill in all fields, save, and restart. Volvo will email you a 6-digit OTP — paste it into the OTP field, save, and restart again. Once authenticated, you can remove your email, password, and OTP from the config. Only the VCC API Key and VIN are needed going forward.

vccApiKey.title: VCC API Key
vccApiKey.description: Primary API key from your application on developer.volvocars.com. Always required.

username.title: Volvo ID (email)
username.description: Only needed for first-time setup or if the refresh token expires. Can be removed after successful login.

password.title: Volvo ID password
password.description: Only needed for first-time setup or if the refresh token expires. Can be removed after successful login.

otp.title: One-Time Password (OTP)
otp.description: 6-digit code from the Volvo email. Only needed during initial setup. Remove after successful login.

engineStartDuration.title: Engine start duration (minutes)
engineStartDuration.description: How long the engine runs when started remotely. Max 15 minutes (API limit).

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often the plugin fetches the latest vehicle state from Volvo. Default is 1800 (30 minutes) to stay well within the 10,000 requests/day API limit.

showLock.title: Show Lock
showLock.description: Lock / unlock tile in the Home app.

showClimate.title: Show Climate Pre-condition
showClimate.description: Switch to start / stop climate pre-conditioning.

showEngine.title: Show Remote Start
showEngine.description: Switch to remotely start or stop the engine.

showDoors.title: Show Doors
showDoors.description: Contact sensors for all 6 openings (doors, hood, tailgate) with an at-a-glance summary tile.

showFuel.title: Show Fuel Level
showFuel.description: Fuel level as a percentage tile with a low-fuel alert below 15%.

debug.title: Debug logging
debug.description: Log every API request, response, and state change to the Homebridge log. Useful for troubleshooting.

layout.title: First-time Setup
layout.description: Fill in for initial authentication only. Once logged in, these can all be removed.

layout.title: Accessories
layout.description: Choose which tiles appear in the Home app. All shown by default.
